plans.title: Autonomous Content Engine — Hands-off SEO/Affiliate Site
plans.nextAction: Fritz's explicit ask: a revenue process he is NOT involved in. He chose the most hands-off seed (autonomous content engine) over ad-funded/audience/marketplace paths, accepting the tradeoff. The engine (scripts/content-engine/) auto-generates quality-gated, niche, FTC-disclosed SEO articles, assembles a lean static site, and publishes on a cron. Monetized via affiliate links + display ads. Production article generation reuses site-studio/lib/brain-interface.js; runs offline with a deterministic template fallback (this container is firewalled).
plans.blocker: Monetization accounts (Amazon Associates / Ezoic / AdSense) must be created by Fritz — an agent legally cannot sign up as him.; Affiliate/ad networks pay to a bank account, not Cash App directly — the $FAMtasticFritz cashtag does not apply to this revenue path.; Ranking is a months-long compounding game; early earnings are effectively $0. This is an asset that appreciates, not a fast dollar.; Deploy (Netlify/Pages) + live LLM generation run on Fritz's Mac; the cloud container is firewalled.
remainingWork: Create the monetization-account handoff and bind the engine to a live domain/runtime.
Package the deploy/publish path and quality/ranking hardening.

plans.title: Financial Agents — Market Watch & $10 Leaderboard
plans.nextAction: A fleet of paper-trading strategy agents that watch the markets, make a daily prediction, and report effectiveness as a leaderboard: if each agent started the session with $10, what is it worth at the close? Net-new — a brain grep confirmed no prior financial/trading code existed in the FAMtastic repo (all 'trading/stock/crypto' hits were stock photos / the job queue). Simulation/paper first on real recent market data; live brokerage execution (e.g. Alpaca paper API) is a later, gated step requiring broker credentials.
plans.blocker: No prior financial code in the brain — built from scratch this session.; Live execution needs a broker account + API keys (Alpaca paper recommended first) — Fritz decision, gated.; Data source is keyless/free (e.g. Stooq) — fine for a daily sim, not low-latency intraday.
remainingWork: Build the data ingest, strategy fleet, evaluation/reporting, and broker-gated adapter lanes.

plans.title: Fritz Companion App
plans.nextAction: A companion app that works the way Fritz talks to his second-in-command right now: ask a question, get an answer, run the operation — from his pocket. Mobile-first chat client over the Shay gateway, surfacing the Command Center daily briefing, with push so Shay can reach out first. This is the 'phone companion' already named in the Shay master plan Phase 3.
plans.blocker: Shay gateway is local today; remote/secure access for a phone off-LAN is unbuilt (master plan: set API_SERVER_KEY before Hetzner exposure).; No push pipeline yet — depends on the reach fabric from shay-omnipresent-assistant.
remainingWork: Choose the client stack, define secure off-LAN gateway access, build the thin mobile shell, and define proactive-send policy.

plans.title: Mission Control / Command Center
plans.nextAction: A single mobile-first view that organizes everything Fritz has in flight. The generator reads the live repo ledgers (plans/registry.json, tasks/tasks.jsonl, runs/runs.jsonl, proofs/proof-ledger.jsonl, agents/catalog.json, platform/registry/capabilities.json, sites) and emits command-center/{index.html, briefing.md, state.json}. Every active plan is scored on stage, momentum, autonomy, and profitability, and the briefing names what needs Fritz, the most profitable next move, and the most autonomous win.
plans.blocker: Generator is run manually today — no fam-hub command and no cron yet (task 001).; Not yet served by Studio /api/ops or mounted in the Workbench/Shay Desk (task 002).; No automatic delivery of the morning briefing to Fritz's phone yet (task 003).; billing.* and work.* capabilities generate/draft only; send paths are blocked on a payment-provider decision and Jira/Slack creds (tasks 004-005).
remainingWork: Add the canonical refresh command, mount the dashboard in Studio/Workbench, deliver the briefing automatically, and promote billing/work drafts into live connected actions.

plans.title: Shay — Omnipresent Virtual Assistant
plans.nextAction: Build Shay from a Telegram-only assistant into a true omnipresent virtual assistant: manager-grade, with a virtual body (avatar/voice/persona), reachable everywhere Fritz is — smartphone, web, voice (Alexa/Google), smartwatch (watchOS/WearOS), and AR/smart glasses — and able to reach him first across all of them. Working assumption: the exact assistant Fritz wants does NOT exist as one product; it exists only in pieces, so we compose it on top of the existing Shay runtime (Hermes-based, ~/.shay/).
plans.blocker: Device-platform lock-ins (Apple/Meta/Amazon) will limit some reach channels — to be characterized by the research before committing to a channel.; Virtual-body (real-time avatar/voice) cost and latency are unproven for always-on use — needs the P2 tradeoff study.
remainingWork: Finish the landscape report, define the reach fabric, run the virtual-body tradeoff study, and map the wearable/glasses lane.
